description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, geometric design with a predominantly off-white body and a contrasting dark wood accent along the top and one side. The front face includes a rectangular black handle and a slightly protruding section, likely indicating a drawer or compartment. One side displays a set of window-like black grid patterns on a white panel, while the opposite side has a solid maroon-colored section. The back is mostly plain, with the dark wood accent forming a prominent border. The cabinet's surfaces are smooth and hard, with some minor scuff marks visible, suggesting it is built for durability and frequent use in an urban environment.
description: A modern, off-white filing cabinet with a dark wood accent, black handle, and geometric design details. Features include a window-like panel and a maroon side section.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main off-white body, a black handle, and a protruding section on the right, likely a drawer.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a window-like black grid pattern on a white panel and some scuff marks on the surface.
description_view_2: The back view is dominated by the dark wood accent forming a border along the top and left side, with a plain off-white panel.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals a solid maroon-colored section and the continuation of the dark wood accent.
